title: bot: payment amount parsing silently truncates to 0
description: In dispatcher.rs line 58, amount.trim().parse::<u64>().unwrap_or(0) silently converts any non-numeric string to 0 zatoshi. A PaymentRequest with amount='0.1 ZEC' or '100_000 satoshis' both parse to 0. The comment acknowledges this is 'best-effort' but this is incorrect behavior—it produces silent data loss. Correct: log the parse failure or emit BotEvent::Error for unparseable amounts.
